taxonomy: Bathmium villosum is a genus of flowering plant. It belongs to the family Boraginaceae, commonly known as borage family. The species is native to South Africa and is also found in other parts of the continent. Bathmium villosum is a shrub-like plant with hairy stems and leaves. It is often found in dry, sandy areas and rocky outcrops.
uses: Bathmium villosum, also known as Vellozia vellozoides, is a species of flowering plant. However, there is limited information available on the medicinal uses of Bathmium villosum.
